title: epilobium paniculatum var. subulatum
intro: Epilobium paniculatum var. subulatum, also known as the Willowherb or Willow Weed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the evening primrose family, Onagraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Epilobium paniculatum var. subulatum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation and pain, and support prostate health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, allowing for various methods of consumption, such as drinking the tea or taking the tincture sublingually.
